goal: Certify: no vertex of an srg(99,14,1,2) has exactly 19 C4 fibers. For each of the 2 exceptional-fiber-PAIR orbits, 19 good fibers' C4 edges (76 units) + any single genuine defect on either exceptional fiber => UNSAT. With R230 (no vertex has all 21) this gives: no vertex has >= 19 C4 fibers.

frame_convention.fiber: class {matched-pair index pi, pj}; its 4 far vertices are (p,q) for p in pair pi, q in pair pj; 4 C4 edges = share-one-local edges, 2 diagonals = share-none edges

orbit_enumeration.note: The rooted group contains S7 on the 7 matched-pair indices; the 210 pair-positions split into exactly these 2 orbits (two edges of K7 are either disjoint or share a vertex). One representative per orbit settles all 210 positions.

stabilizer_collapse.justification: Within one exceptional fiber, the fiber's setwise stabilizer in the rooted group acts transitively on its 4 C4 edges (one orbit) and on its 2 diagonals (one orbit). So one C4-edge-absence cert + one diagonal-presence cert per fiber suffice; the other 4 are listed for explicitness and flagged essential_representative=false.
stabilizer_collapse.minimal_cert_count: 2 orbits x 2 exceptional fibers x 2 essential defect classes = 8 essential certs; 24 listed total (6 per fiber x 2 fibers x 2 orbits).

vacuity_control.principle: A C4-edge-absence defect is a NEGATIVE unit: it can never over-fill a radius-1 quota, so it cannot produce the M1-style single-quota vacuity. A diagonal-presence defect is POSITIVE; each was radius-1 checked together with the 76 good units and passes. For every cert we also recorded that the defect unit ALONE (no good units) does NOT conflict under BCP, so the refutation content lives in the good-fiber units, exactly as the coordinator required for k=20.

certs.vacuity_note: negative unit cannot over-fill any quota; conflict requires the good-fiber units (defect-alone is non-conflicting: True)
certs.stabilizer_orbit: C4-edge orbit size 4: transitive under the fiber's setwise stabilizer (S2xS2 on the two matched pairs + pair swap); the 4 C4 edges form ONE orbit

certs.vacuity_note: negative unit cannot over-fill any quota; conflict requires the good-fiber units (defect-alone is non-conflicting: True)
